summary.summary: Trio v0.8.2 patch release containing multiple user-facing fixes and a CI/dev version bump. Release notes list: OmnipodKit becomes the sole Omnipod driver and legacy OmniBLE/OmniKit submodules removed (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); Live Activity improvements including rendering active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, a fix for indefinite overrides that previously collapsed the chart rule to the current moment, and COB/widget localization fixes (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); a watch connectivity/back-sync performance fix to reduce stale data hangups (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); and a fix so today's carbs/fat/protein macros appear correctly in the Meals chart (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212). In the repository CI/config, Config.xcconfig APP_DEV_VERSION was incremented from 0.8.1.3 to 0.8.1.4 and then to 0.8.1.5 across two commits (commit:a0399fd229e03c3a59570d40a3562c81a2fcaccc, commit:b04d0e6465a8e2ed965ffada93e9271beaf23c59; diff:6b407ea4d5cc; file:5692afcf1358).
summary.userFacingImpact: Conservative summary of user impact based on release notes and config changes: users may see the Omnipod selection simplified to a single "All Omnipod Types"/OmnipodKit entry in add-pump/onboarding flows (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); Live Activity lock-screen/chart will display active temp targets as a green band with a named badge, and indefinite overrides should render correctly instead of collapsing to the current moment (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); watch app/back-sync should recover from long staleness faster and avoid getting stuck during processing (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212); the Meals statistics view will show today's macros correctly (pr:gordolio/Trio#1212, pr:nightscout/Trio#1212). The APP_DEV_VERSION bumps are CI/dev configuration changes (commit:a0399fd229e03c3a59570d40a3562c81a2fcaccc, commit:b04d0e6465a8e2ed965ffada93e9271beaf23c59, diff:6b407ea4d5cc, file:5692afcf1358). If additional code-level verification or runtime testing is required to confirm behavior in every edge case, human review is recommended.
